GitHubApiData.name: cursor-deepseek-v4-proxy
GitHubApiData.description: 解决 Cursor 使用 DeepSeek V4 模型时的 `reasoning_content must be passed back` 错误

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: 解决 Cursor 使用 DeepSeek V4 模型时出现的 `reasoning_content must be passed back` 错误
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: CursorでDeepSeek V4モデルを使用する際の「reasoning_content must be passed back」エラーの解決方法
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: Cursor에서 DeepSeek V4 모델 사용 시 발생하는 `reasoning_content must be passed back` 오류 해결 방법
TranslatedDescriptions.en: Fix the `reasoning_content must be passed back` error when using the DeepSeek V4 model with Cursor.
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Résolution de l'erreur `reasoning_content must be passed back` lors de l'utilisation du modèle DeepSeek V4 avec Cursor
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Solución al error `reasoning_content must be passed back` al usar el modelo DeepSeek V4 en Cursor
